description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a wide fuselage and a distinctive blue tail fin adorned with white stars. The aircraft features four underwing turbofan engines, two on each wing, with blue nacelles and white accents. The wings are low-mounted and swept back, each equipped with upward-angled winglets at the tips. The fuselage is primarily white, with the word 'HiFly' prominently displayed in blue on the forward section. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The airplane's windows are arranged in two rows, indicating a double-deck configuration typical of large airliners.
description: A large, white commercial passenger airplane with blue engines and a star-patterned blue tail, featuring swept low wings and a double-deck fuselage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, four engines, and the blue tail fin with white stars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'HiFly' logo, double-deck windows, and the blue engine nacelles under the swept wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue tail, engine placement, and the overall length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with multiple main and nose gear units (not fully visible).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
